verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Philippines. All agents adhered to their roles, providing concrete, image-grounded evidence. The tournament successfully used the regulatory and meta evidence (pedestrian sign, utility poles) to distinguish the Philippines from its closest competitor, Indonesia.
